html:
The 2024 Octane OC High Tech Awards took place on Thursday, September 26th. Octane, a highly renowned non-profit organization serving Southern California, hosts this annual event to honor top innovators, entrepreneurs, and technology leaders in Orange County. You can see the full list of finalists in all categories here. 

Revolv3 was chosen as a finalist for the “Best Enterprise or B2B Technology Innovation” award for a second year. Revolv3’s CEO and Founder, Frank Arellano, shared a snippet of what Revolv3 is about on the big screen at the event, stating “Revolv3 is an enterprise level payments platform for recurring businesses, our focus is on increasing approvals, revenue, and retention for our customers. We do that through a mix of AI, data that we get from issuing banks, and rules we get from the best-in-class processors."

Open Sesame, a B2B venture providing ultra low-latency audio to application developers, won the award for “Best Enterprise or B2B Technology Innovation”. The full list of the winners can be found here. 

As we celebrate the achievements of the tech industry's best and brightest from the Octane OC High Tech Awards, we also look ahead with excitement and anticipation. The future holds even more opportunities for innovation, growth, and collaboration. Congratulations to all of the winners and finalists.
